task: Parse an X12 EDI 834 enrollment/maintenance transaction (5010A1). Emit normalized member-roster JSON: { format, purpose, sponsor, insurer, members[], summary }. Distinguishes add/change/term/audit per the BGN02 purpose code and INS01 member action.

recipes.name: edi-834
recipes.source: function generate(input,lib){var t=input&&input.edi_text||'',r=(lib.pack&&lib.pack.rules)||{},rels=r.relationship_codes||{},aM={'021':'add','024':'cancel','025':'reinstate','030':'audit','004':'term'},pL={'00':'original','15':'resubmission','22':'reissue','23':'update','07':'verification','08':'audit_or_compare','24':'termination','25':'reinstatement'},D=function(d){return d&&d.length===8?d.slice(0,4)+'-'+d.slice(4,6)+'-'+d.slice(6,8):null;},s=t.split(/~\s*/).filter(Boolean),o={format:'834',purpose:null,transaction_set_purpose_code:null,sponsor:{name:null,tax_id:null},insurer:{name:null,tax_id:null},members:[],summary:{adds:0,changes:0,terms:0,total:0}},m=null,i,f,g,L,d,a;for(i=0;i<s.length;i++){f=s[i].split('*');g=f[0];if(g==='BGN'){o.transaction_set_purpose_code=f[1]||null;o.purpose=pL[f[1]]||'original';}else if(g==='N1'){var p={name:f[2]||null,tax_id:f[3]==='FI'?f[4]||null:null};if(f[1]==='P5')o.sponsor=p;else if(f[1]==='IN')o.insurer=p;}else if(g==='INS'){if(m)o.members.push(m);m={action:aM[f[3]||'']||'change',subscriber_id:null,group_number:null,name:{first:null,last:null,middle:null},dob:null,gender:null,relationship:rels[f[2]||'']?rels[f[2]].toLowerCase():'other',address:null,coverage:[]};}else if(g==='REF'&&m){if(f[1]==='0F')m.subscriber_id=f[2];else if(f[1]==='1L')m.group_number=f[2];}else if(g==='NM1'&&m&&f[1]==='IL'){m.name.last=f[3];m.name.first=f[4];m.name.middle=f[5];}else if(g==='N3'&&m){m.address=m.address||{};m.address.line=f[1];}else if(g==='N4'&&m){m.address=m.address||{};m.address.city=f[1];m.address.state=f[2];m.address.zip=f[3];}else if(g==='DMG'&&m){if(f[1]==='D8')m.dob=D(f[2]||'');m.gender=f[3]||null;}else if(g==='HD'&&m){m.coverage.push({plan_code:f[4]||null,coverage_level:f[5]||null,effective_date:null,term_date:null});}else if(g==='DTP'&&m&&m.coverage.length){L=m.coverage[m.coverage.length-1];d=D(f[3]||'');if(f[1]==='348')L.effective_date=d;else if(f[1]==='349')L.term_date=d;}}if(m)o.members.push(m);for(i=0;i<o.members.length;i++){a=o.members[i].action;if(a==='add')o.summary.adds++;else if(a==='term'||a==='cancel')o.summary.terms++;else o.summary.changes++;}o.summary.total=o.members.length;return o;}

pack.description: X12 5010A1 834 reference rules. bgn02_purpose_codes are the real BGN02 transaction-set purpose values from the 834 implementation guide. ins01_member_indicators are the INS01 yes/no insured indicators. relationship_codes are the real INS02 individual relationship qualifiers.
